gaps.title: Storage Boundary Finalization
gaps.decision_needed: Define the authoritative storage location for every entity type and event type.
gaps.resolution_path: Storage ownership matrix published; product-per-role baseline unchanged.

gaps.title: First Supported Language Set
gaps.decision_needed: Tune per-language confidence thresholds and package-manager-aware import graphs (npm/cargo/go.mod).
gaps.resolution_path: Package manifests + DI injection CALLS + confidence_policy; exotic DI frameworks iterative.

gaps.title: LLM Provider and Local Model Strategy
gaps.decision_needed: Define model routing profiles by task type, risk level, tenant, and environment.
gaps.resolution_path: Benchmark models and create default ModelRoutingProfile.

gaps.title: Human Approval UX
gaps.decision_needed: Choose first approval surface and required approval interaction model.
gaps.resolution_path: Design approval workflow and add UI/API contract.

gaps.title: Tenant Isolation Implementation Details
gaps.decision_needed: Define isolation enforcement strategy per storage and service boundary.
gaps.resolution_path: Threat model + code-graph/MCP isolation tests; single-tenant v1 mode.

gaps.title: Weight Profile Governance
gaps.decision_needed: Define who can change profiles and how changes are validated.
gaps.resolution_path: Add governance workflow and profile change tests.

gaps.title: Development Port Profile Ownership
gaps.decision_needed: Choose default development base and ownership of port profile changes.
gaps.resolution_path: Port profile file format and Phase 8 gate ownership checks.
gaps.closed_in: Phase 8 port-profile catalog and verification gate

gaps.title: Schema Registry Implementation
gaps.decision_needed: Decide whether schema registry is a service, repo directory, or database-backed registry.

gaps.title: Domain Pack, Feature Profile, And Rule Suggestion Governance
gaps.decision_needed: Define authoritative schema, ownership, activation workflow, and conflict precedence.
gaps.resolution_path: JSON Schemas + precedence standard + unit schema tests.

gaps.title: Impact KPI Instrumentation Completeness
gaps.decision_needed: Ensure KPI fields and comparison method are machine-checkable.
gaps.resolution_path: Impact KPI catalog and Phase 9 gate.
gaps.closed_in: Phase 9 impact-kpis catalog and verification gate

gaps.title: Neo4j as Code Graph Store Timing
gaps.decision_needed: When to migrate from Postgres code_graph schema to Neo4j in production.
gaps.resolution_path: Keep Postgres as default; exercise Neo4j via AGENTCORE_CODE_GRAPH_STORE=neo4j; cutover after language matrix or explicit ADR. Python support remains mandatory.
